bom — settings.json prefixed with a UTF-8 BOM (0xEF 0xBB 0xBF).

encoding/json does not strip a leading BOM before parsing, and
treatAsEmpty only recognizes ASCII whitespace as empty. So a
BOM-prefixed settings.json is refused with ErrParseFailed.

Expected Import result:
  errors.Is(err, claudecode.ErrParseFailed) == true

If a future story teaches Import to strip the BOM before parse,
this fixture flips from error-only to a full round-trip case.
